shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — All aboard! The "Big Boy" 4014 steam locomotive is coming to the Steamtown National Historic Site next month. The largest operating steam locomotive will be in Scranton on display June 15 and June 16 and will be able to be viewed by the public from June 17 to June 30, [...]
